turns.user_message: I noticed I haven't really looked forward to anything lately. It's like my usual spark is just gone.
This feeling of emptiness has been hanging around for weeks now. I just don't get excited about things like I used to.
I feel completely hollow inside, like I'm just a shell going through the motions. Nothing I do seems to bring any real feeling back.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves. This has been going on for a while.
